global_vs_local.global: Auth, User Profile, App Config, Cache (Zustand/React Query)
global_vs_local.local: Form values, Modal visibility, Component-specific toggles (useState)
global_vs_local.lifting: Only lift state when shared by distinct siblings, prefer Context for deep trees

zustand_best_practices.selection: Always use specific selectors (state => state.prop) to avoid unnecessary re-renders
zustand_best_practices.atomic_actions: Group multiple state changes into a single action
zustand_best_practices.hydration: Use persist middleware with MMKV for persistent global state

render_optimization.prev_refs: Use useRef for values that shouldn't trigger renders (timers, scroll tracking)
render_optimization.heavy_computations: Always wrap in useMemo with proper dependency arrays
